stage_planner_context.prompt_text:
Stage-aware planner context for G3/clean candidate=g3_default
Candidate steps: detect_multiple_objects, select_correct_object, move_to_pregrasp, approach_object, left_gripper_close, left_vertical_lift, detect_place_occupancy, choose_alternate_place, place_object, open_gripper_release, verify_place_zone
[candidate_generation] use 2 positive memories; recommended skills: detect_multiple_objects, select_correct_object, move_to_pregrasp, approach_object, left_gripper_close, left_vertical_lift
[candidate_ranking] compare against 4 risk memories; max risk=0.8000
[sandbox_rewrite] critic warnings=4; watch skills: detect_multiple_objects, select_correct_object, move_to_pregrasp, approach_object
[execution_writeback] recent similar executions=3
[planner_input] objectives: construct_or_rank_candidate_using_stage_specific_memory; prefer_supported_steps_from_candidate_generation; penalize_retrieved_failure_and_gap_risks; prepare_rewrite_hints_before_sandbox_rollout; check_writeback_evidence_before_execution_commit
[planner_input] constraints: do_not_claim_real_robot_validation_without_real_episode_evidence; do_not_override_sandbox_or_motion_critic_blocks; use_stage_context_as_auxiliary_guidance_not_as_final_safety_decision
Use generation evidence for candidate construction, ranking evidence for risk penalties, rewrite evidence for sandbox repair, and writeback evidence before committing execution.

recovery_plan.goal: Recover from potential grasp failure by verifying grasp before transport in G3 clean scenario

steps.reason: Identify all objects to sort in clean G3 environment
Pick the target object for sorting task
Position robot for pregrasp of the selected object
Move closer to the selected object for grasping
Close left gripper to grasp the object
Confirm object is held to avoid grasp failure (mitigate risk from grasp miss experiences)
Lift object vertically for transport
Check if target placement zone is occupied
Select alternate place if target is occupied (risk avoidance)
Place object in the chosen (alternate) spot
Release object by opening left gripper
Confirm object is in the correct placement zone

constraints: Retry grasp if verify_grasp fails; do not proceed with lift/place
risk_notes: Risk of grasp miss (from pseudo_real_g3_grasp_miss_001) mitigated by verify_grasp step

recovery_plan.goal: Ensure safe placement with rechecked occupancy after alternate place selection in G3 clean scenario

steps.reason: Identify objects to sort in clean G3 environment
Pick the target object for sorting task
Position robot for pregrasp of the selected object
Move closer to the selected object for grasping
Close left gripper to grasp the object
Lift object vertically to prepare for transport
Check if target placement zone is occupied
Select alternate place if target is occupied
Recheck occupancy of alternate place to avoid placing in occupied spot
Place object in the rechecked (alternate) spot
Release object by opening left gripper
Confirm object is in the correct placement zone

constraints: Reselect alternate place if rechecked place is occupied; do not place
risk_notes: Risk of placing in occupied alternate spot (from pseudo_real_g3_place_occupied_success_001) mitigated by recheck

validated_robot_plan.goal: Recover from potential grasp failure by verifying grasp before transport in G3 clean scenario

constraints: Retry grasp if verify_grasp fails; do not proceed with lift/place
